news.title: Huaqiangbei Reports 35% Revenue Jump During Chinese New Year
news.title_cn: 华强北春节营收同比增长35%
news.summary: Huaqiangbei reported a 35% increase in revenue during the Chinese New Year holiday season, driven by strong tech product sales.

news.title: Huaqiangbei Issues First Official AI Recommendation List
news.title_cn: 华强北发布首份官方AI推荐榜单
news.summary: The list, compiled from sales data, highlights eight hardware categories driving pre-holiday sales: drones, robotics, AI smart glasses, AI toys, and more.

news.title: Heat Map Shows What's Moving Off Shelves in Huaqiangbei
news.title_cn: 热力图显示华强北热销产品
news.summary: Huaqiangbei sub-district government released an AI sales heat map, showing drones are red-hot and AI toys rocketed 200%.

news.title: Storage Chip Spot Prices Plunge in Huaqiangbei
news.title_cn: 华强北存储芯片现货价格跳水
news.summary: DDR4 and DDR5 memory module prices have fallen 20-30% since mid-March in Huaqiangbei's spot market.

news.title: Mobile Phone Price Hike Sweeps Huaqiangbei
news.title_cn: 手机涨价潮席卷华强北
news.summary: Mid-to-low-end smartphone prices have risen by up to 30% due to AI-driven storage chip shortages.

news.title: Wired Earphones Make a Comeback in Huaqiangbei
news.title_cn: 有线耳机在华强北“翻红”
news.summary: After years of decline, wired earphones saw a 20% sales increase in early 2026, though Bluetooth remains the mainstay.
